name: io.github.spanlens/mcp-server
description: Query Spanlens LLM observability from Cursor, Claude Desktop, or Continue via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: SPANLENS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Spanlens API key. Must be a scope=public key (sl_live_pub_*) issued from the Public Keys card at https://spanlens.io/projects — the server refuses to start with a full-access sl_live_* key.

environmentVariables.name: SPANLENS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API endpoint for self-hosted Spanlens. Default: https://api.spanlens.io
